news.title: Semester II Academic Calendar Extension Announcement
news.content: The Academic Senate has extended the Semester II schedule by one week to allow sufficient time for project presentations and continuous assessments revisions. Exams will now commence on July 14, 2026.

news.title: Zenti Annual Hackathon 2026: Registration Open
news.content: Calling all student software devs! This year's topic centers on Open Governance and Generative AI helpers. Secure your slots today. Total cash prizes aggregate KES 500,000 + sponsor tech-kits.

news.title: Internal Audit: Faculty Course Materials Submissions
news.content: All faculty members are reminded that the portal for uploading supplementary class handouts and lecture videos will close on June 22. Submission complies with regulatory compliance audits.

courses.title: B.Sc. Computer Science
courses.description: A comprehensive program covering software engineering, systems design, artificial intelligence, and database structures.

courses.title: B.Eng. Electrical & Electronics
courses.description: Hands-on curriculum in microcontrollers, circuit theory, power systems, and telecom network design.

courses.title: B.Sc. Data Science & Analytics
courses.description: Master statistical analysis, regression analysis, predictive modeling, machine learning, and big data techniques.

courses.title: B.Sc. Cybersecurity & Forensics
courses.description: Learn cyber defense, vulnerability analysis, cryptography, network pentesting, and digital forensic examination.

testimonies.name: Erick Cheruiyot
testimonies.content: Zenti completely reshaped my perspective of tech development. The lecturers provided absolute real-world coaching, and the active campus coding team with hackathons set a solid cornerstone for my software career path.

testimonies.name: Tabitha Kamau
testimonies.content: We routinely recruit junior staff from Zenti. Their graduates are consistently well-adapted, possess extensive modern framework skillsets (React, TypeScript), and possess practical accountability in technical workflows.
